KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_MANUAL_ASSEMBLY.desc: Choose 2 Components in order. Fuse the second Component's Cost and effects into the first.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_FEED_PUMP.title: Feed Pump
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_FEED_PUMP.descriptio: Add 1 Mechanical Material to your Hand. Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_REACTION_MOLD.title: Reaction Mold
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_REACTION_MOLD.descri: Add 1 Compound Material to your Hand.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_RECIPROCATING_CUTTER: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Add 1 Scrap to your Hand. Whenever you play a Skill Component, return this from your Discard Pile to your Hand.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_RETURN_PLATE.title: Reset Baffle
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_RETURN_PLATE.descrip: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Whenever you play an Attack Component, return this from your Discard Pile to your Hand.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_PLANNED_OBSOLESCENCE: Choose a Component in your Hand. Transform it into Scrap and gain Energy equal to its current Cost.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_RECYCLING_WORK_ORDER: Decompose 1 Scrap in your Hand. Gain {EnergyGain:diff()} Energy. Draw 2 cards.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_KILLER_FACTORY_SCRAP: Can be decomposed, recycled, stored, or used as fuel by specific machines.
Used to manufacture mechanical Components and perform mechanical Procedures.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_COMPOUND_MATERIAL.de: Used to manufacture chemical Components, batteries, and Virus Components.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_UNIVERSAL_MATERIAL.d: Substitutes for either material and supports advanced Procedures and repair.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_OVERLOAD_PUNCH.title: Overload Punch
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_GROUND_EXPLORATION.d: Add 1 Mechanical Material to your Hand. Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If it deals unblocked damage, add {MaterialCount:diff()} Compound Material to your Hand.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_ACCUMULATE.title: Accumulate
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_ACCUMULATE.descripti: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Add {MaterialCount:diff()} Mechanical Materials and {MaterialCount:diff()} Compound Materials to your Draw Pile.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_HANDCRAFTED_BLADE.de: Exhaust 2 Mechanical Materials in your Hand. Create a Reciprocating Blade.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies twice. Exhaust.
Exhaust 1 Compound Material in your Hand. Create a Buffer Plate.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_BUFFER_PLATE.title: Buffer Plate
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_UNIVERSAL_REPLACEMEN: Choose {TransformCount:diff()} cards in your Hand. Transform them into {TransformCount:diff()} Universal Materials.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_MATERIAL_RATION.desc: Choose a Mechanical or Compound Material to add to your Hand. Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_THERMAL_SMELTING.des: Decompose 1 Scrap in your Hand. Add 1 Universal Material to your Hand. Draw 1 card.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_THERMAL_CORE.title: Thermal Core
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_THERMAL_CORE.descrip: Decompose a Material or Scrap in your Hand. Gain 1 Energy, plus 1 for Universal Material.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_QUICK_LOAD.title: Quick Load
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_EMERGENCY_UNLOAD.des: For each card in your Hand, gain {Block:diff()} Block.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_FOLDED_SHIELD.title: Folded Shield
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_LAYERED_ARMOR.title: Layered Armor
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_STANDARD_UPGRADE.des: Choose an unupgraded Component in your Hand and upgrade it.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_LIGHTWEIGHTING.title: Lightweighting
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_LIGHTWEIGHTING.descr: Choose a Component costing more than 0. Reduce its Cost by 1.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_MANUAL_SORTING.title: Manual Sorting
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_MANUAL_SORTING.descr: Look at the top {LookCount:diff()} cards of your Draw Pile. Add {TakeCount:diff()} to your Hand and return the rest in order.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_DIRECTED_RETRIEVAL.d: Choose a Component from your Draw Pile and add it to your Hand. Exhaust.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_FLOOD_RETRIEVAL.desc: Draw until the Draw Pile is empty. After each draw, discard the rightmost card in your Hand.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_PRECISION_BLANK.desc: Choose a Precision Cutting Core or Precision Protection Core to add to your Hand.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_VIRUS_NEEDLE_CLUSTER: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Transform a random other card in your actual Hand into an unprocessed copy of this.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_SMART_RETRIEVAL.desc: Choose 1 card in your Draw Pile and give it Sticky. Draw {Draw:diff()} cards.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_DELAYED_ANALYSIS.des: Whenever a Mechanical Material is Exhausted, add Compound Material to Discard, and vice versa.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_RAPID_RECYCLING.desc: Exhaust all other cards in your Hand. For each, add Compound Material to Draw and Mechanical Material to Discard.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_ADVANCED_DRILLING.de: At the start of each turn, add a random Mechanical or Compound Material to your Hand.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_STRONG_ATTRACTOR.des: Whenever you draw a Material, draw 1 card.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_ATTRACTOR.title: Attractor
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_ATTRACTOR.descriptio: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Draw 1 card. Whenever you draw a Material, return this from Discard to your Hand.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_STANDARD_CALIBRATION: Choose 1 Component and increase one Damage or Block value by {Amount:diff()}.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_EXTERNAL_SPRING.desc: Choose a Component. Give it External Spring: after it is played, return it to your Hand unless it was broken or scrapped. If your Hand is full, put it in Discard instead.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_SOLIDIFICATION.title: Solidification
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_SOLIDIFICATION.descr: Choose a Disposable Component. Remove Disposable and give it Permanent Component.
Choose a Component. Give it Efficient: when scrapped, create Universal Material instead.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_HARDENING.title: Hardening
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_HARDENING.descriptio: Choose a Component. Give it Hard: when damaged, create its Damaged Product.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_STREAMLINED_IMPROVEM: Choose 1 Component. Raise its Cost by {CostIncrease:diff()}, then reduce its Cost by 1 each time it resolves.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_STICKY_COATING.title: Sticky Coating
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_STICKY_COATING.descr: Choose a Component. Give it Sticky: when it enters your Hand, retrieve same-name cards from Draw.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_PRECISIONIZATION.des: Choose a Component. Give it Precision Component and remove Fragile Component.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_OVERALL_CASTING.desc: Choose a body, then choose up to 3 other Components in order and fuse them into it.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_FILTER.title: Filter
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_FILTER.description: Draw {Draw:diff()} cards, then discard any number of cards from your Hand.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_PORTABLE_BATTERY.des: While in Hand, pays machine Charge first. When empty, transform it into Scrap.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_BASIC_SETUP.title: Basic Setup
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_BASIC_SETUP.descript: Install a machine from the basic blueprint category.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_PROCESSING_BLUEPRINT: Install a machine from the processing blueprint category.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_POWER_BLUEPRINT.desc: Install a machine from the power blueprint category.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_PRECISION_SETUP.desc: Install a machine from the advanced blueprint category.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_AUTO_LOAD_PROTOCOL.d: When a Component enters your Hand, load it into the leftmost empty arm.
Automatically start a loaded arm when it has enough Charge.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_SELF_STARTING_BUS.de: After machines play {Threshold:diff()} Components, recharge all machines and draw 1 card.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_BLUEPRINT_REWRITE.de: Blueprint choices gain extra options and a free refresh this combat.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_VIRUS_MOTHER.title: Virus Mother
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_VIRUS_MOTHER.descrip: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Transform 1 random other card in Hand into a full copy of this.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_RECURSIVE_PROCESSING: After a Precision Component completes {Threshold:diff()} Procedures, create 1 Universal Material and charge the leftmost table by 1.
Start every machine that can currently start. Gain 2 Block for each success.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_REFRESH_BLUEPRINT_OP: Refresh this set of blueprint options for free.
KILLER_FACTORY_MOD_EXTERNAL_SPRING: [gold]External Spring:[/gold] After this is played, return it to your Hand unless it was broken or scrapped. If your Hand is full, put it in Discard instead.
